metadata.name: Bertsimas and Tsitsiklis (1997) — 1-Block LP
metadata.description: Example 6.2 from Bertsimas and Tsitsiklis Introduction to Linear Optimization (p.245-246). 1 subproblem with finite variable bounds [1,2], 1 equality coupling constraint. Minimise: -4x1 - x2 - 6x3 s.t. 3x1+2x2+4x3=17. Known optimal: x1=2, x2=1.5, x3=2, obj=-21.5.
